headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on LyondellBasell Industries, Lowers Price Target to $80
summary: Citigroup  analyst Patrick Cunningham   maintains LyondellBasell Industries (NYSE:LYB) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $90 to $80.

headline: Dividend Income Update Q1 2026
summary: The markets may swing wildly from week to week and month to month, but dividends are seemingly more stable, reliable and predictable. Read more here.
